name: Section 80C - Investment & savings
description: LIC, EPF, PPF, ELSS, NSC, SSY, principal of home loan, 5-yr FD, NPS Tier-I (employee). One bucket - hits the cap fast.

name: Section 80CCC - Pension fund
description: Pension fund contribution. Counts within the 80C 1.5L cap.

name: Section 80CCD(1) - NPS Tier-I (self)
description: NPS Tier-I self contribution. Either within 80C OR up to 10% of salary - whichever is less.

name: Section 80CCD(1B) - NPS additional
description: Additional NPS Tier-I deduction OVER AND ABOVE 80C 1.5L cap. The most-missed deduction in the country.
common_miss: Often missed; commonly assumed to be inside 80C

name: Section 80CCD(2) - NPS employer
description: Employer NPS contribution. ALLOWED IN BOTH REGIMES. 10% of salary for private sector
column9: Only employer-side deduction allowed in new regime

name: Section 80D - Health insurance
description: Health insurance premium. 25k self+family, 25k parents. 50k each if senior citizen.

name: Section 80E - Education loan interest
description: Education loan interest paid. No upper cap. Available for 8 years from start of repayment.

name: Section 80EEA - Home loan first-time buyer
description: Home loan interest for first-time home buyers. Sunset rules apply (loan must be sanctioned in eligible window).

name: Section 80EE - Home loan first-time buyer (older)
description: Older first-time home buyer loan interest scheme. Sunset.

name: Section 80G - Donations
description: Donations to approved charities. 50% or 100% of donation
common_miss: with or without limit depending on charity. Need 80G receipt.

name: Section 80TTA - Savings interest
description: Interest on savings bank account. 10k cap.

name: Section 80TTB - Senior FD interest
description: Senior citizens only - interest from FDs and savings. 50k cap. Replaces 80TTA for seniors.
common_miss: Only seniors qualify; not available below age 60

name: Section 24(b) - Home loan interest
description: Home loan INTEREST deduction (not principal - that's in 80C). 2L cap for self-occupied. Lossable from House Property income (capped at -2L).

name: House Rent Allowance exemption
description: Least of: rent paid - 10% of salary, OR actual HRA received, OR 50% (metro) / 40% (non-metro) of salary.

name: Leave Travel Allowance
description: Two trips per block of 4 years. Only travel within India. Bills required.

name: Standard Deduction (salaried)
description: Flat deduction for salaried/pensioners. Available in BOTH regimes (was 50k earlier; raised to 75k FY24-25 onwards in new regime)
